benefit: Safer and auditable execution of repo-modifying actions
implementation_notes: Implement tool_use message blocks similar to Claude: update query runner to detect tool_use, perform permission checks, run tools, return tool_result messages. Reuse crates/ragent-core Tool trait and add orchestration in Rust. Ensure progress messages and ordering preserved. ~2-4 weeks

benefit: Reduces onboarding friction and increases adoption
implementation_notes: Enhance ragent-tui with onboarding flow, release notes screen, trust dialogs. Use existing TUI library components, add ProjectOnboarding-like sequence. ~1-2 weeks
Detect read-only tools and run them concurrently up to a semaphore limit (MAX_TOOL_USE_CONCURRENCY). Merge results in deterministic order. ~1-2 weeks

benefit: Fast repository search with low latency
implementation_notes: Bundle ripgrep or call system ripgrep; add GrepTool wrapper in tools module. ~2-3 days

benefit: Better error diagnostics for bundled code
implementation_notes: Attach debug_meta images with sourcemap mappings to Sentry error events; provide build-time step to produce/upload sourcemaps. ~1-2 weeks

benefit: Deterministic tests and faster repeated runs
implementation_notes: Implement recording of LLM requests/responses to VCR files and add replay mode. Add cache for prompt hashing. ~1-2 weeks
Implement MCP client to fetch centrally-defined commands and a local MCPTool. Requires protocol implementation and auth. ~3-6 weeks

benefit: Collect comparator metrics and pick better outputs
implementation_notes: Add optional dual-response path: request two responses and run comparator selection or present to user for feedback. Integrate with telemetry. ~1 week

benefit: Streamlines PR/comment generation with safer commits
implementation_notes: Add guided git flows: show git status, propose staged changes, run commit with template. Use existing git utils and permission dialogs. ~3-5 days
Support local LLM models or lightweight embeddings for degraded offline interactions. Requires model packaging and optional inference engine. ~8-12 weeks
